ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff.
